sentences.text: written by anthony keren illustrated by janet mcdonnell focus question how does the boy know he has grown
i must have grown over the summer
my old shirt is too small
my old sweatshirt is too small
my old pants are too small
my old hat is too small
my old socks are too small
my old shoes are too small
it is good i have a little brother

connections writing and art what do you do when you grow out of your clothes draw a picture and write about it social studies how is the story in the book related to reducing reusing and recycling share your ideas with a partner
